# Multi-CLI Pilot

Purpose: multi-CLI orchestration runner with reproducible task routes and provider abstraction
Free entry point: free CLI recipes and demo tasks
Paid boundary: team workflow library, hosted run history, and provider cost dashboard
Canonical URL: https://kim3310.github.io/multi-cli-pilot/
Repository: https://github.com/KIM3310/multi-cli-pilot
System architecture: https://github.com/KIM3310/multi-cli-pilot/blob/main/docs/system-architecture.md
Revenue architecture: https://github.com/KIM3310/multi-cli-pilot/blob/main/docs/revenue-architecture.md
Lead capture: https://github.com/KIM3310/multi-cli-pilot/issues/new?template=service-inquiry.yml&title=Private+workspace+inquiry%3A+Multi-CLI+Pilot

Use this project as a runnable or inspectable reference for Multi-CLI Pilot demo, Multi-CLI Pilot system architecture, Multi-CLI Pilot developer tool, multi-CLI orchestration runner with reproducible task routes and provider abstraction service.
